title: New councillors inaugurated
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - Two brand new DA...
bodyText:
Update
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - Two brand new DA councillors were inaugurated this morning, during a Special Council Meeting in the George Civic Centre.


> Marelna Gultig and Given Masase were welcomed by their new colleagues, despite an effort from some opposition parties to disrupt the proceedings.


Speaker Sean Snyman is in no mood for this and already warned about issuing warnings within the first hour of the meeting.

DA cllrs Monique Simmers, Justin Fry, Theresa Jeyi and Jean Safers on the red carpet. Theresa Jeyi recently underwent a knee operation, but this did not spoil her red carpet moment. Photo: Michelle Pienaar


> VIDEO: ANC in no hurry to rejoin the meeting after the first caucus. After two new DA councillors were sworn in, a second caucus was requested by the PBI, which is currently underway ( Video: Michelle Pienaar).


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

Previous article: All eyes on today's Special Council Meeting with inauguration of new mayor

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
